# widgets

A small widget pricing service.

# widgets

A small widget pricing service. Run the tests before shipping.

pull_requests.title: Add optional cart discount to total()
pull_requests.body: Adds a `discount` parameter (default 0.0) to `total()` so callers can apply a percentage discount to a cart. Backwards compatible — existing callers keep the old behavior.
pull_requests.head: add-discount
pull_requests.author: GaganSD

pull_requests.title: Expand README with a testing note
pull_requests.body: Docs-only change: adds a one-line reminder to run the tests before shipping.
pull_requests.head: fix-readme-typo
pull_requests.author: GaganSD
